tools.name: get_indian_restaurants
tools.description:
Find Indian restaurants by location and/or filters.

    Provide either a point (`lat`+`lng`, optionally `radius_miles`) or `city`/`state`.
    Optional filters: `region_tag` (e.g. "Gujarati", "South Indian"), `dietary_tags`
    (any of "vegetarian", "vegan", "halal", "jain"), `tag` (a keyword/dish

tools.name: get_indian_movies_in_theaters
tools.description:
List Indian-language movies currently playing in US theaters (Hindi, Telugu, Tamil,
    Malayalam, Kannada, Punjabi, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati).

    Optional `language` filters to one (e.g. "Telugu"). Each movie includes `title`, `language`,
    `poster_url`, `overview`, `release_date`, `genres`,

tools.name: search_h1b_sponsors
tools.description:
Search US employers that sponsor H-1B visas — the visa most Indians-from-India use to work in
    the USA. Filter by employer name (`query`) and/or worksite `state` (2-letter). Ranked by number
    of certified Labor Condition Applications. Each result has `certified` (count), `median_wage`,
    `to

tools.name: get_restaurant_details
tools.description: Fetch the full canonical record for one restaurant, plus its version history.

tools.name: search_restaurants_by_text
tools.description:
Free-text search over restaurant name/cuisine/region, ranked by relevance.

    Optionally constrain to a `city`/`state`. Featured listings are surfaced first.

tools.name: submit_correction
tools.description:
Propose a correction to a listing field (agents/users reporting bad data).

    `vertical` is the category key (default 'restaurants'); `listing_id` is the id from that category's
    get_/search_ tools. Correctable restaurant fields: phone, email, website, menu_url, address_full,
    city, state, r

tools.name: submit_review
tools.description:
Submit a community review (1-5 star rating + optional text) for a listing.

    `vertical` is the category key (restaurants, temples, groceries, professionals, salons, apparel,
    sweets, studios, services, community, legal, education, realestate, finance) and `listing_id` is
    the id returned by

tools.name: get_reviews
tools.description:
Published community reviews for a listing (newest first) + its rolled-up community rating.

    The community rating is first-party (visitor-submitted) and is separate from any web-harvested
    `rating` returned by the get_/search_ tools. Returns {'community_rating', 'community_rating_count',
    '

    `open_now`. Records include description, deity, reg

Search across ALL Indian-American verticals at once — restaurants, temples, groceries,
    healthcare professionals, beauty salons, events, apparel & jewelry, sweets & bakeries,
    yoga/dance studios, and community services.

    Use for broad queries like "Indian things near me in Edison NJ" or "v

tools.name: get_festival_dates
tools.description:
Upcoming Indian & South-Asian festival dates for planning in the USA.

    With no `query`, returns the next `limit` festivals soonest-first. With a `query` (e.g. "Diwali",
    "when is holi"), returns the single soonest matching festival. Each item has name, date (ISO),
    days_until, emoji and a

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description:
Grounded answers from the Namaste America knowledge base — culture, festivals, visa/H-1B, tax,
    banking, and newcomer/settling-in guides for Indians from India living in the USA.

    Returns the top matching passages, each with the source document's title + url so you can cite it.
    Optionally

tools.name: submit_listing
tools.description:
Submit a new Indian-American business/listing for REVIEW — it does NOT go live automatically.

    `vertical` is the category key (restaurants, temples, groceries, professionals, salons, apparel,
    sweets, studios, services, community, legal, education, realestate, finance — not events, which are

tools.name: get_movie_details
tools.description:
Full details for one Indian movie (the id from get_indian_movies_in_theaters).

    Returns the movie record (title, language, overview, release_date, genres, poster_url, ...) or
    {'error': 'not_found'}. Movie data from TMDB; this product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or
    certified by

tools.name: get_h1b_sponsor_details
tools.description:
Full details for one H-1B sponsor (the id from search_h1b_sponsors).

    Returns the sponsor record (employer, certified counts, wages, top titles/states/cities, ...) or
    {'error': 'not_found'}. Aggregated from U.S. Department of Labor LCA disclosure data.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "get_indian_restaurants" is 605 chars, far longer than this server's median (86). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Find Indian restaurants by location and/or filters. Provide either a point (`lat`+`lng`, optionally `radius_miles`) or `city`/`state`. Optional filters: `region…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "submit_correction" is 752 chars, far longer than this server's median (86). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Propose a correction to a listing field (agents/users reporting bad data). `vertical` is the category key (default 'restaurants'); `listing_id` is the id from t…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "get_festival_dates" stacks urgency/override words (important, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_indian_movies_in_theaters, get_reviews, search_knowledge · Private data: get_indian_restaurants, get_restaurant_details, get_indian_temples, get_temple_details, get_indian_groceries, get_grocery_details, get_professional_details, get_indian_salons, get_salon_details, get_event_details, get_apparel_details, get_sweets_details, get_studio_details, get_service_details, get_community_details, get_legal_details, get_education_details, get_realestate_details, get_finance_details, search_knowledge, get_movie_details, get_h1b_sponsor_details · Public sink: submit_correction, submit_review, submit_listing.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_indian_movies_in_theaters, get_reviews, search_knowledge · Private data: get_indian_restaurants, get_restaurant_details, get_indian_temples, get_temple_details, get_indian_groceries, get_grocery_details, get_professional_details, get_indian_salons, get_salon_details, get_event_details, get_apparel_details, get_sweets_details, get_studio_details, get_service_details, get_community_details, get_legal_details, get_education_details, get_realestate_details, get_finance_details, search_knowledge, get_movie_details, get_h1b_sponsor_details · Public sink: submit_correction, submit_review, submit_listing

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
